subject: Sociology
title: Weber on Charismatic Authority
description: A fast breakdown of Weber on Charismatic Authority for builders.

hook.text: Moses, Jesus, Muhammad — they held no office. Their power came from something harder to define.

buildup.text: Weber identified charismatic authority — power based on followers' belief in a leader's special gifts.

discovery.text: Charismatic leaders break existing rules. They say follow me, not follow tradition, and people obey.

twist.text: Charisma can't last forever. When the leader dies, the movement must routinize into rules and hierarchy.

climax.text: Every world religion began with charisma and survived through bureaucracy. Prophets give way to priests.

quiz.question: What happens to charismatic authority over time according to Weber?
